name: Hot Fudge Cake with Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 4
Preheat to 350°F
Sift dry ingredients in a bowl. Cut shortening. Add egg and milk. Stir until flour is moist. Put batter in 9-inch cake pan. Mix sauce well, pour over batter slowly. Bake for 40 minutes. Serve with milk or cream (while warm).
